meta.title: NBD Pro — Exhaustive Functional QA — Coverage Ledger
meta.note: Source of truth. Never reset. status: UNTESTED|PASS|FAIL|BLOCKED|FIXED. Re-run build-ledger.js to fold in new fragments without losing test results.

rows.label: Presentation Mode toggle (back-btn)
rows.expected_behavior: Toggles a light brand 'presentation' view for in-person walkthroughs; flips aria-pressed and applies/removes presentation styling (window.togglePresentationMode).
rows.notes: Presentation toggle produced no observable DOM change after real + JS clicks — likely a fullscreen request automation can't grant. Needs a manual/visual pass.

rows.label: Back to dashboard (← arrow)
rows.expected_behavior: Navigates to dashboard.html (the CRM dashboard / kanban).
rows.notes: Back-to-dashboard link present with dashboard.html href.

rows.label: Lead Intelligence SCORE chip
rows.expected_behavior: Expands/collapses the lead-score breakdown panel (#leadScorePanel) showing the 0-100 score composition (engagement/stage/recency/portal signals).
rows.evidence: customer.html?id=<lead> opens via card-detail 'View Full Customer Details' nav; page renders all sections (Timeline & Tasks / Milestones / Photos / Generate Documents / Portal Messages / Voice Intelligence) + SCORE chip '36' + quick-actions (stage progressStage, Add Task, Copy/Text/Email/Share Portal, Review Request, Referral, Edit Info, Customer Report PDF)
rows.notes: Customer/job page LOADS + renders + nav-from-card-detail works + lead scoring displays (36). ⚠ CDP-idle-hostile AFTER a mutation: clicking progressStage (stage transition) froze the tooling (page re-render/reload stalls document_idle) — the mutation controls are PRESENT but their effects couldn't be auto-verified via CDP (need Jo-manual or non-CDP tool). SEND controls (Text/Email/Share portal, Review-SMS, Referral-SMS) = outbound boundary (not fired). Representative of the 146 customer rows; per-control deep-dives (tasks/notes CRUD, stage persist, AI drafts, messages, property-intel) remain — same idle-hostile caveat.

rows.label: Referred by <name> badge
rows.expected_behavior: Opens the referring customer's record (navigates to the customer page for lead.referredByLeadId).
rows.notes: #referredByLink renders.

rows.label: Call (quick-actions)
rows.expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer with the customer's phone number (href set to tel: at load).
rows.notes: Call link carries tel:5135550177 (lead's real phone).

rows.label: Book Inspection (SMS)
rows.expected_behavior: Opens native SMS composer pre-filled with an inspection booking link to the customer phone.
rows.notes: Book Inspection link carries sms:<lead phone>.

rows.label: Email (quick-actions)
rows.expected_behavior: Opens default mail client to the customer's email address.
rows.notes: Email link carries mailto:<lead email>.

rows.label: Copy Booking Link
rows.expected_behavior: Copies the inspection booking link to the clipboard and toasts confirmation.
rows.notes: Copy Booking Link copied the personalized booking message (clipboard spy).

rows.label: Customer Report (📄)
rows.expected_behavior: Generates and exports a branded customer report as a PDF for this lead (window.exportCustomerPDF).
rows.notes: Customer Report generated + rendered in the viewer ('Customer Report — ZZ_QA CustPage Test').

rows.label: Edit Info (✏️)
rows.expected_behavior: Opens the Edit Customer modal pre-populated with the lead's contact + job fields.
rows.notes: Edit Info opens the modal. See NEW-D17: header/info panels do not refresh after save (data persists; stale until reload).

rows.label: → Move to Next Stage
rows.expected_behavior: Advances the lead to the next stage in its per-track pipeline (insurance/cash/finance/warranty/service) and logs a stage-change timeline event (window.progressStage).
rows.reveal_state: after:stage-resolved (display:none until current stage known; hidden at terminal stages)
rows.notes: Stage progress works behind a native confirm ('Move customer to Contacted stage?'); persisted new->contacted, button advanced to Move-to-Inspected, timeline logged the change. NOTE: the page self-reloads on stage move — this is what 'froze tooling' in the prior session (CDP exec dies mid-navigation, page is fine).

rows.label: Copy Portal Link
rows.expected_behavior: Auto-generates the full project portal link if missing, copies it to clipboard, toasts; falls back to opening the share panel on failure.
rows.notes: Copy Portal Link works (slow ~6-8s; mints + copies a Storage-hosted portal URL under portals/{uid}/).

rows.label: Text Portal Link
rows.expected_behavior: Opens native SMS composer to the customer phone with the portal link + greeting pre-filled.
rows.notes: Text Portal Link fires a location.href sms: protocol navigation (frame detach observed = control wired) — compose can't be verified via CDP and location can't be stubbed.

rows.label: Email Portal Link
rows.expected_behavior: Opens default mail client to the customer email with subject + body containing the portal link pre-filled.
rows.notes: Email Portal Link — same location.href mailto: pattern as 013.

rows.notes: Preview Portal renders the LIVE portal in an in-page modal (project header, status 5%, project value $6,000).

rows.label: 🗑 Delete (bulk)

rows.notes: Boundary reached + cancel honored. FINDING: bulk-delete uses a NATIVE window.confirm (not nbdConfirm as gap-deleteconfirm assumed) — this is why an un-overridden select-all bulk-delete froze CDP earlier. Never fire on real data.

rows.notes: Required-field stage gate works: blocks the advance + opens the lead modal with a missing-fields banner + click-to-jump anchors. Gate is stage-specific (fires entering claim_filed, not new→contacted).

rows.label: 💬 Text portal link / 📧 Email portal link

rows.notes: DANGER: send. Text only when phone set; Email only when email set. Drive to compose boundary only.

rows.label: 🔍 Preview portal
rows.expected_behavior: PortalLinkHelpers.previewForLead opens a preview of the customer portal for this lead.
rows.notes: Always available.

rows.label: 💤 Snooze lead… / ⏰ Unsnooze
rows.expected_behavior: If not snoozed, LeadSnooze.prompt(id,name) opens the snooze date picker; if snoozed, promptUnsnooze(id) clears the snooze. Label reflects current state.
rows.evidence: overflow → Snooze lead… → snooze modal opens (reason chips + presets Tomorrow/Next Mon/1wk/2wk/1mo + custom date + Cancel); picked 'Tomorrow morning' → snoozeCount=1 + snoozedUntil set, modal closed
rows.notes: Snooze records. OBSERVATION: card stayed visible in kanban despite 'will hide' copy (may need reload, or snoozed leads keep an indicator) — candidate, low. Leaked 'SNOOZED UNTIL TOMORROW' title confirmed the snooze applied.

rows.label: 🗑 Delete lead
rows.expected_behavior: deleteLead(lead.id) soft-deletes the lead (opens its own confirm — #deleteConfirm modal with confirmDeleteLead / cancelDeleteConfirm).
rows.evidence: context-menu '🗑 Delete lead' → opens #delConfirmOverlay
rows.notes: Delete trigger reaches the confirm boundary.

rows.label: ✕ (close lead modal)
rows.expected_behavior: closeModal target=leadModal closes the modal; closeLeadModal also clears all fields, resets title to 'Add Lead', and hides conditional field blocks.
rows.notes: Two close affordances (floating ✕ + bar ✕). Backdrop click also closes.

rows.label: Save (modal bar)
rows.expected_behavior: saveLead validates name+address (required), validates email/phone, runs LeadDedup.checkBeforeSave (dedup overlay), then writes the lead via _saveLead and closes the modal.
rows.notes: Duplicate of #leadSaveBtn (092). saveLead was the C-1 no-op bug (live-qa-2026-06-07) — verify it's in _NBD_CALL_ALLOWLIST.

rows.label: First Name (input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's firstName; required (saveLead rejects empty name+address).
rows.notes: Required for save.

rows.label: Last Name (input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's lastName.

rows.label: Address (autocomplete input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's address; required for save. Drives the #ac-lAddr autocomplete dropdown (place suggestions).
rows.notes: Required for save; autocomplete suggestions are dynamically rendered into #ac-lAddr.

rows.label: Phone (tel input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's phone; validated by saveLead. Same-phone match is a HIGH dedup trigger.
rows.notes: HIGH-match dedup key (last 10 digits).

rows.label: Email (input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's email; format-validated by saveLead before save.

rows.label: Stage (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's pipeline stage; grouped optgroups (Lead/Insurance/Cash/Finance/Warranty/Service/Contract/Job/Exit). Changing it triggers toggleInsuranceFields (shows job-detail block for post-contract stages).
rows.notes: ~30 stage options; track optgroups filtered by job type.

rows.label: Job Type (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets jobType (insurance/cash/finance/warranty/service); on change toggleInsuranceFields shows/hides the insurance/finance/job detail blocks, sub-type+trades row, and filters the stage dropdown.
rows.notes: Master toggle for conditional field blocks (078-088).

rows.label: Sub-Type (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's sub-type; options come from SUB_TYPES[jobType]. Row hidden until a job type is set (refreshSubTypeAndTrades).
rows.notes: #lSubTypeRow is .dn until job type set.

rows.label: Trades (multi-select chips)
rows.expected_behavior: Each chip toggles its data-selected attribute (multi-select); selection read on save. Chips populated by refreshSubTypeAndTrades; row hidden until job type set.
rows.notes: Dynamically-rendered chip toggles; representative element.

rows.label: Source (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's source (Door Knock / Storm Canvass / Referral / Online / Other).

rows.label: Damage Type (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's damageType (Roof/Siding Hail/Wind, Gutters, Full Exterior, Fire, Water, Other); drives the card damage chip.

rows.label: Claim Status (select)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's claim status (No Claim / Filed / Adjuster Scheduled / Approved / Supplementing / Paid Out / Denied); drives the card claim tag.

rows.label: Job Value ($) (number input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's job value; drives the card value badge and pipeline-value stat.

rows.label: Follow-Up Date (date input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's follow-up date; drives follow-up-due alerts and the 'Due' card tag.

rows.label: Insurance Carrier (input)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets the lead's insurance carrier (free text); drives the card carrier chip.

rows.selector: #insuranceFieldsBlock inputs (Claim Number / Filed By / Policy / Date of Loss / Estimate Amt / Deductible / Supplement Status / Scope of Work)
rows.label: Insurance Claim Details (block)
rows.expected_behavior: Eight fields (#lClaimNumber, #lClaimFiledBy, #lPolicyNumber, #lDateOfLoss, #lEstimateAmount, #lDeductible, #lSupplementStatus, #lScopeOfWork) feed AOB/inspection/supplement docs. Block shown only when jobType=insurance (toggleInsuranceFields).
rows.source_ref: dashboard.html:11673-11711 (block hidden default; shown by toggleInsuranceFields:113)
rows.notes: 8 inputs/selects in one conditional block. claimNumber is a gate required-field for claim_filed stage.

rows.selector: #financeFieldsBlock inputs (Finance Company / Loan Amount / Loan Status / Pre-Qual Link)
rows.label: Financing Details (block)
rows.expected_behavior: Four fields (#lFinanceCompany, #lLoanAmount, #lLoanStatus, #lPreQualLink) capture financing data. Block shown only when jobType=finance.
rows.notes: 4 fields in one conditional block.

rows.label: Job Details (block)
rows.expected_behavior: Two fields (#lScheduledDate, #lCrew) capture install scheduling. Block shown only when stage is post-contract (job_created..closed) per toggleInsuranceFields.
rows.notes: 2 fields; shown only for job/install stages.

rows.label: 🏠 Pull Property Intel
rows.expected_behavior: pullIntelForModal fetches property intel for the entered address and renders it into #modalIntelResult (window._modalIntel) for save.

rows.label: Notes (textarea)
rows.expected_behavior: Free-text notes (roof age, damage, adjuster, supplements) saved on the lead.

rows.label: Next actions (context buttons)
rows.expected_behavior: renderNextActionsPanel populates STAGE_ACTIONS-driven buttons (e.g. send estimate, schedule adjuster) for the lead's current stage. Shown only when editing an existing lead.
rows.notes: display:none on Add; populated dynamically per stage on Edit. Some actions may be send/esign — inspect per stage before driving.

rows.label: Save Lead (bottom button)
rows.expected_behavior: saveLead — same validate→dedup→_saveLead→close flow as the top-bar Save (#leadModalSave).
rows.notes: Duplicate Save affordance (with #leadModalSave 067).

rows.label: Existing-lead match button (dedup)
rows.expected_behavior: On Save with duplicate matches, the dedup overlay lists matches (HIGH=same phone/address). Clicking a match returns {proceed:false, openLeadId} — abandons the new lead and opens the existing one.
rows.notes: Conditional reveal — only when a HIGH/MEDIUM match exists. Repeats per match.

rows.label: Create anyway (dedup override)
rows.expected_behavior: Returns {proceed:true, duplicateOf:<matchId>} so saveLead proceeds and creates the lead anyway, stamping duplicateOf for audit. This is the HIGH-MATCH override path.
rows.notes: The HIGH-MATCH 'create anyway' override called out in surface scope.

rows.label: Cancel (dedup)
rows.expected_behavior: Returns {proceed:false} — closes the dedup overlay and aborts the save, leaving the lead modal open.
rows.evidence: filled ZZ_QA lead, SAVE → lead count 19→20, persisted to window._leads + survived reload; nav badge updated to Pipeline 20
rows.notes: RE-VERIFIES C-1 (saveLead no-op bug) — saveLead works + persists. ⚠ minor: modal did not auto-close after save.

rows.label: Move to Deleted / Cancel (delete confirm)
rows.expected_behavior: confirmDeleteLead soft-deletes the lead (moves to Deleted drawer); cancelDeleteConfirm dismisses the confirm modal without deleting.
rows.evidence: #delConfirmOverlay 'Move to Deleted' (confirmDeleteLead) → ZZ_QA lead soft-deleted, count 20→19, card removed; overlay closed
rows.notes: Single-lead delete confirm fired (soft-delete to Deleted bin). Cancel button present (boundary). Exercised on ZZ_QA throwaway only.

rows.label: ← Back to Pipeline
rows.expected_behavior: goTo target=crm navigates back to the kanban pipeline view.
rows.notes: Prospects page.

rows.label: 🚪 D2D Tracker
rows.expected_behavior: goTo target=d2d navigates to the Door-to-Door tracker.
rows.notes: Off-surface destination.

rows.label: ＋ New Knock
rows.expected_behavior: openD2DOrGo opens the D2D quick-knock capture (or navigates to D2D if not loaded) to add a new prospect knock.

rows.label: Prospect stats strip (clickable buckets)
rows.expected_behavior: Prospects.render() populates clickable stat tiles that filter the prospect board by bucket (e.g. interested, callback, follow-up). Dynamically rendered.
rows.notes: JS-rendered; representative tile.

rows.label: Prospect filters + view toggle (kanban/list)
rows.expected_behavior: Prospects.render() populates filter controls and a kanban/list view toggle that re-renders #prospects-board accordingly.
rows.notes: JS-rendered filter/toggle cluster.

rows.label: Prospect card / Promote to customer
rows.expected_behavior: Prospects.render() draws prospect cards with a Promote action that calls promoteProspect(id) — flips isProspect=false and graduates it into the kanban pipeline (the convert lead->job entry point from Prospects).
rows.notes: Promote = prospect→customer conversion. Repeats per prospect card.

rows.label: Stale-prospect cleanup banner / Conversion analytics (collapsible)
rows.expected_behavior: Prospects.render() auto-shows a 60d+ stale-cleanup nudge (with a cleanup action) and a collapsible conversion-analytics panel.
rows.notes: Banner conditional on stale prospects; analytics collapsible.

rows.selector: #crmDiagnostic buttons (loadSampleData / retryLoadLeads / testFirestoreRules / copyDebugInfo / Dismiss / debugConsole toggle)
rows.label: CRM Diagnostic panel actions
rows.expected_behavior: Shown only when loadLeads fails. Buttons: load sample data, retryLoadLeads (re-fetch), testFirestoreRules (rules probe), copyDebugInfo (clipboard), toggle debug console, and hideEl Dismiss.
rows.notes: Error-state-only panel; 6 controls grouped.

rows.label: ＋ New Estimate
rows.expected_behavior: Calls window.openEstimateV2Builder() which runs estimate-v2-ui.js open(): lazily builds + shows the full-screen #estV2Modal builder (270-item catalog, presets, tiers, BoldSign).
rows.notes: Primary path to the V2 builder. A duplicate ＋ New Estimate also at dashboard.html:7773/7789 (other views) — this one is the canonical Estimates-view trigger.

rows.label: Classic
rows.expected_behavior: startNewEstimateOriginal(): hides #est-list, shows #est-builder (Classic 4-step wizard), resets estData/selectedTier, sets title 'New Estimate', clears step-1 fields, showEstStep(1).
rows.notes: Legacy ghost button. Distinct from startNewEstimate (which opens the 2-card builder-chooser picker).

rows.label: ← Back to CRM
rows.expected_behavior: goTo('crm') navigates the SPA to the CRM/pipeline view.

rows.label: ＋ Build your first estimate
rows.expected_behavior: startNewEstimate(): opens the 2-card builder-chooser overlay (Classic Builder vs V2 Builder) so the rep picks which builder to start.
rows.reveal_state: after:no-estimates-empty-state (static markup; replaced by renderEstimatesList when estimates exist)
rows.notes: Static empty state in HTML; the JS renderEstimatesList empty state (dashboard-widgets.js:44) shows a different message pointing at Classic/V2 buttons.

rows.label: Classic Builder
rows.expected_behavior: Hides the overlay and calls startNewEstimateOriginal() to launch the Classic 4-step wizard.
rows.notes: Picker built via createElement (no static selector). Two cards + Cancel.

rows.label: V2 Builder
rows.expected_behavior: Hides the overlay and calls window.openEstimateV2Builder() to open the V2 modal builder.

rows.label: Cancel
rows.expected_behavior: Hides the builder-chooser overlay (overlay.style.display='none') without starting a builder.
rows.notes: Overlay also closes on backdrop click (estimates.js:1084).

rows.label: ✎ Edit (card body click + Edit button)
rows.expected_behavior: viewEstimate(id): hides list, shows #est-builder in 'Edit Estimate' mode, resets step-2 form to neutral defaults then restores the saved estimate's fields for a round-trip edit.
rows.reveal_state: after:loadEstimates-has-rows (repeats per estimate card; record one representative row)
rows.notes: Reopen/round-trip path. Card body and the Edit button both dispatch data-act='open'. Step-2 reset at viewEstimate guards the 2026-05-19 corruption bug.

rows.label: ⎘ Duplicate
rows.expected_behavior: duplicateEstimateAction(id): calls window._duplicateEstimate(id) to clone the estimate doc, toasts success/failure, list re-renders.

rows.label: ✏ Rename
rows.expected_behavior: renameEstimateAction(id): window.prompt seeded with current name, on non-empty value calls window._renameEstimate(id, name), toasts result.

rows.label: 👤 Assign
rows.expected_behavior: assignEstimateAction(id): opens showAssignLeadPicker modal (createElement) listing leads to attach the estimate to a customer; row click links via _assignEstimateToLead, also an Unassign option.
rows.notes: Unassigned chip (data-act='assign') on the card body also triggers this; assigned chip (data-act='open-lead') navigates to customer.html.

rows.label: 🗑 (Delete)
rows.expected_behavior: deleteEstimateAction(id): nbdConfirm 'Delete ... This cannot be undone.'; on confirm calls window._deleteEstimate(id), toasts result, list re-renders.
rows.notes: DRIVE ONLY TO CONFIRM BOUNDARY. Guarded by nbdConfirm/window.confirm.

rows.label: 👤 <customer name> (assigned lead chip)
rows.expected_behavior: Navigates window.location to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId> for the linked customer.

rows.label: ✕ Close
rows.expected_behavior: close(): hides #estV2Modal (removes .open). Draft persists in localStorage/Firestore.

rows.label: Per-SQ (mode tab)
rows.expected_behavior: setMode('per-sq'): sets state.mode, toggles active class on the two mode tabs, re-renders catalog/scope/total via per-SQ flat-rate path.
rows.notes: Paired toggle with Line-Item.

rows.label: Line-Item (mode tab, default active)
rows.expected_behavior: setMode('line-item'): sets state.mode to catalog line-item path, toggles active class, re-renders. Default selected.

rows.label: Insurance (job-mode tab, default active)
rows.expected_behavior: setJobMode('insurance'): sets state.jobMode='insurance' (no tax line), toggles active class, re-renders totals/rollup.
rows.notes: Paired with Cash; drives whether tax line shows in the rollup.

rows.label: Cash (job-mode tab)
rows.expected_behavior: setJobMode('cash'): sets state.jobMode='cash' (tax shown), toggles active class, re-renders totals with county sales tax applied.

rows.label: Good (tier tab)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='good', repaints active tier button, re-renders. Per-SQ mode picks the $545 Good rate; line-item mode feeds tier into resolveEstimate material grade. scheduleDraftSave.
rows.notes: Three-way tier toggle (Good/Better/Best).

rows.label: Better (tier tab, default active)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='better', repaints active, re-renders. Per-SQ $595 rate. Default tier.

rows.label: Best (tier tab)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='best', repaints active, re-renders. Per-SQ $660 rate.

rows.label: County / Jurisdiction (select)
rows.expected_behavior: On change writes state.county (7 options Hamilton/Butler/Warren/Clermont OH + Kenton/Boone/Campbell KY), re-renders so permit cost + sales tax update.
rows.notes: Default hamilton-oh.

rows.label: Property address for auto-measure (input)
rows.expected_behavior: Free-text address consumed by autoMeasure(); not bound to state directly (read at button-click). Mirrors customer address if that is typed first.

rows.label: 📐 Auto-measure
rows.expected_behavior: autoMeasure(): POSTs address to NBDIntegrations.requestMeasurement (HOVER/EagleView/Nearmap), polls Firestore measurements/{jobId} every 4s up to 10min, spreads result into measurements + adds a $75 aerial-report pass-through line.
rows.notes: Requires NBDIntegrations + configured provider secret; surfaces status in #v2measureStatus. May not be exercisable without vendor key.

rows.label: Raw Roof Area (SF) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('rawSqft', Number): writes state.measurements.rawSqft and re-renders catalog/scope/total.
rows.notes: Core driver of every formula-based quantity.

rows.label: Pitch (rise/12) (select)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('pitch', Number): sets pitch (4/6/8/10/12/14), re-renders so pitch multiplier adjusts adjusted SqFt.
rows.notes: Default 8/12.

rows.label: Eave LF (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('eaveLf', Number): drives drip-edge / starter / gutter LF-based line quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Rake LF (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('rakeLf', Number): drives rake-edge LF quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Ridge LF (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('ridgeLf', Number): drives ridge cap + ridge vent LF quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Hip LF (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('hipLf', Number): drives hip cap LF quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Valley LF (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('valleyLf', Number): drives valley metal / ice-water LF quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Pipes (count) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('pipes', Number): drives pipe-boot per-each quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Chimneys (count) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('chimneys', Number): drives chimney-flash per-each quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Skylights (count) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('skylights', Number): drives skylight-flash per-each quantities; re-renders.

rows.label: Tear-off Layers (select)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('tearOffLayers', Number 1/2/3): drives tear-off labor surcharge; re-renders.

rows.label: Stories (select)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('stories', Number 1/2/3): drives height/access labor factor; re-renders.

rows.label: Cut-up Roof (+3% waste) (checkbox)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('cutUpRoof', bool): BOOL_FIELDS sets state.measurements.cutUpRoof=true adding 3% waste; re-renders.

rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('hasChimneyFlash', bool): per-SQ mode adds $425 flat chimney-flash add-on; re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
rows.label: Skylight Flashing (+$350) (checkbox)

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
rows.label: Valley Metal LF (@ $8.50) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('valleyMetalLf', Number): per-SQ mode multiplies LF by $8.50; re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
rows.label: Gutters LF (@ $8.50) (input)
rows.expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('guttersLf', Number): per-SQ mode multiplies LF by $8.50; re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)

rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('standard-reroof'): clears scope, pushes ~20 catalog codes (tear-off, GAF HDZ, synthetic, IWS, starter, drip, ridge, valley, pipe, chimney, step, vent, dumpsters, permit, labor); re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
rows.label: Storm Claim (preset)
rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('storm-claim'): Standard Reroof scope + insurance doc lines (LAB PHOTO, LAB WALK, CUP IWS-E, CUP KICK) and premium nail line; re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
rows.label: Small Repair (preset)
rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('small-repair'): loads small-job measurement defaults (200 SF / 20 LF eave), 8 repair codes incl DSP HAUL, sets minJobCharge $2500; re-renders + syncs inputs.
rows.notes: Carries baked-in measurements that overwrite typed values.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
rows.label: Shingle Patch (preset)
rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('shingle-patch'): tiny 10 SF defaults, 5 barebones codes, sets minJobCharge $500 (trip charge); re-renders + syncs inputs.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
rows.label: Full Redeck (preset)
rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('full-redeck'): full reroof scope + OSB decking, forces deckReplacePct=1.0 (partial measurement merge keeps typed area); re-renders.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
rows.label: Hail Damage Insurance (preset)
rows.expected_behavior: loadPreset('hail-damage-insurance'): premium claim scope — impact shingles, code upgrades, hurricane clips, chimney saddle, full insurance doc package (~24 codes); re-renders.

rows.label: Search by code, name, or tag... (input)
rows.expected_behavior: setSearch(value): filters the 270-item catalog by code/name/tag substring and re-renders #v2items (first 50 shown).

rows.reveal_state: modal:estV2Modal (one row per catalog item, up to 50 shown; record one representative — repeats per item)
rows.notes: Clicking a row toggles it into scope; rows already in scope show green ✓ IN SCOPE and re-clicking is a no-op (use scope-pane × to remove).

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)

rows.expected_behavior: Writes state.customer.email; required (must contain @) for Send-for-Signature. scheduleDraftSave.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)

rows.expected_behavior: Writes state.customer.phone in real time; scheduleDraftSave.

rows.reveal_state: after:item-in-scope (repeats per scope line; record one representative)

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Selected Scope)

rows.reveal_state: after:item-in-scope (repeats per scope line; record one representative)

rows.notes: Requires scope items + EstimateFinalization loaded. Insurance-scope uses legacy HTML formatter (no server PDF).

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Preview/Export)

rows.notes: Customer-facing tier comparison. Server PDF path may need functions deployed.

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Preview/Export)

rows.expected_behavior: finalize('internal-view'): renders the internal cost-basis/margin view (material/labor/OH+profit/margin); tries server renderPdf first then HTML formatter, opens in NBDDocViewer. Internal-only document.
rows.notes: This is the V2 internal profit/margin view (NOT-FOR-CUSTOMER).

rows.route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Save)
rows.label: 💾 Save Estimate to Customer

Doc-gen engine + companyProfile take-effect already PASS (d7-119: contract HTML carries cancellation statute/payment terms/letterhead). E-sign (BoldSign #nbdv-sign-btn) is signature-doc only (absent on marketing docs) — boundary test deferred to a contract/proposal generate. 18 doc types: proposal/contract/inspectionHomeowner+Insurance/invoice/customer_report/warranty/cert/supplement/scope/AOB/change_order/work_auth/payment_agreement/material_delivery/thank_you/company_intro/financing.

Violates PR#594 srcdoc rule (server PDF must be Download-only). Sandbox without allow-same-origin contributes.

Root cause: _docgenSubmit assembles only field values — never data.leadId from the Auto-fill lead select — so _leadIdEarly is null and _persistPromise never runs (verified: leads/{id}/documents stayed empty after lead-selected generates). handleSave then toasts success around a no-op onSave.

rows.label: ✍️ Send for Signature

rows.notes: Send-for-Signature is structurally unreachable from the template library: onSendForSignature requires hasSigners && leadId, but this path never sets data.signers nor data.leadId (see NEW-D2). Signature flows live in lead-context preflight (doc-preflight.js) / estimate e-sign — test there (gap-esign rows).

rows.selector: _prospectConfirm dialog #1 OK (okLabel='Continue', danger:true) — built by D2D.uiConfirm/uiConfirm

rows.notes: Paired Cancel ('Cancel') aborts and leaves lead as a hidden prospect.

rows.selector: _prospectPrompt dialog typed-confirmation input + submit (D2D.uiPrompt/uiPrompt, prompt() fallback)

rows.notes: Typed-confirmation gate. Case-sensitive exact match 'DELETE'. Permanent erase — no recovery.

rows.expected_behavior: Free-text task title. Cleared on openTaskModal (tasks.js:162). Enter key submits via bound keydown handler -> addTask() (tasks.js:188). Empty/whitespace-only input is rejected by addTask (tasks.js:180).
rows.notes: This is the task 'title' field — there is no separate Save button; Add (or Enter) persists.

rows.label: Due date (optional, date picker)
rows.expected_behavior: type=date. Optional due date passed to _saveTask as dueDate (tasks.js:180,93). Cleared on modal open. Empty allowed (stores ''). Drives overdue/Today/Tomorrow labels in the list (tasks.js:168).

rows.label: + Add
rows.expected_behavior: addTask (tasks.js:180): reads #taskInput + #taskDue; if non-empty text and _taskModalLeadId set, clears input then _saveTask -> addDoc(leads/<id>/tasks {text,done:false,dueDate,createdAt}) and re-renders #taskList. No-op on empty text or missing lead id.
rows.notes: This is the de-facto Save/Create for a task. No edit-in-place; tasks are add/complete/delete only.

rows.label: (per-task checkbox — Complete toggle)
rows.expected_behavior: Dynamically rendered per task by renderTaskList (tasks.js:177). data-tk delegate (tasks.js:214) -> checkTask(taskId, checked) (tasks.js:193): optimistically toggles .done on the row, then _toggleTask -> updateDoc(leads/<id>/tasks/<tid> {done, completedAt}) and re-renders after 400ms. This IS the task 'Complete' control.
rows.source_ref: tasks.js:177 (+ delegate tasks.js:214, checkTask tasks.js:193, _toggleTask tasks.js:99)
rows.notes: No standalone 'Complete' button — completion is the row checkbox. Completed tasks sort to the bottom with .done styling.

rows.label: × (per-task Delete)
rows.expected_behavior: Dynamically rendered per task (tasks.js:177). data-tk delegate -> removeTask(taskId) (tasks.js:194): _deleteTask -> deleteDoc(leads/<id>/tasks/<tid>) then re-renders #taskList. NO confirmation gate — single-click permanent delete of the task.
rows.source_ref: tasks.js:177 (+ delegate tasks.js:214, removeTask tasks.js:194, _deleteTask tasks.js:107)
rows.notes: Deletes a subcollection task doc (not the lead). No confirm dialog — flag as a UX risk for the punchlist (accidental task loss).

rows.selector: native window.confirm() OK button (browser-chrome, no DOM selector)
rows.label: OK (native confirm)
rows.expected_behavior: Confirms the account-erasure warning. _gdprRequestErasure (dashboard-api.js:382) shows window.confirm(warning) then on OK imports firebase-functions and calls the 'requestAccountErasure' callable, toasting 'Confirmation email sent. Click the link within 24h...'. Deletion only completes via the emailed link, not here. NOTE: there is NO custom typed-confirmation modal for account deletion — the flagged typed-confirm modal does not exist; the gate is a single native confirm. In standalone/PWA mode window.confirm is patched (standalone-compat.js:154) to ALWAYS return true, silently bypassing this warning.
rows.notes: Account-deletion confirm is a NATIVE browser confirm, not a typed-confirm modal. Cancel = native Cancel (aborts, returns from _gdprRequestErasure). QA cannot drive native confirm via DOM selectors; drive via dialog handler / accept|dismiss. Real risk: PWA confirm-patch bypass.

rows.selector: native window.confirm() Cancel button (browser-chrome, no DOM selector)
rows.label: Cancel (native confirm)
rows.expected_behavior: Aborts account erasure. window.confirm returns false → _gdprRequestErasure returns immediately with no callable invoked and no toast. The account is NOT scheduled for deletion.
rows.notes: Cancel-path of the destructive account-deletion flow. Must verify it truly aborts (and that the PWA confirm-patch does NOT auto-proceed, which it would).

rows.label: OK
rows.expected_behavior: Confirms the 'Delete N lead(s)? They will be moved to the trash.' nbdConfirm prompt raised by bulkDelete (crm-portal-bridge.js:250-253). On OK the promise resolves true → commitBulkLeadOp writeBatch sets {deleted:true, deletedAt:serverTimestamp()} on every selected lead (chunked at 500/batch), then loadLeads + clearBulkSelection + toggleBulkMode. Soft-delete (recoverable from trash), not a hard purge.
rows.reveal_state: modal:nbdConfirm (after:click bulkDelete 🗑 Delete in bulk toolbar)
rows.notes: bulkDelete uses the generic nbdConfirm modal (.sa-btn-ok/.sa-btn-cancel), NOT the dedicated #delConfirmOverlay (that one is single-lead only). Confirm button label is literally 'OK'.

rows.label: Cancel
rows.expected_behavior: Cancels the bulk-delete nbdConfirm. Promise resolves false → bulkDelete returns at crm-portal-bridge.js:251-253 with no batch write; selection is left intact. ESC key resolves false identically (standalone-compat.js:118-120).
rows.reveal_state: modal:nbdConfirm (after:click bulkDelete 🗑 Delete in bulk toolbar)
rows.notes: Cancel-path of bulkDelete. QA boundary control to drive-and-cancel.

rows.label: Move to Deleted
rows.expected_behavior: Confirm button of the DEDICATED single-lead delete modal (#delConfirmOverlay). confirmDeleteLead (crm-portal-bridge.js:506) hides the overlay, calls window._deleteLead(_pendingDeleteId) (soft-delete → moved to Deleted bin), toasts 'Lead moved to Deleted bin', refreshes trash badge. _pendingDeleteId is set by showDeleteConfirm (crm-portal-bridge.js:492) which is invoked from the card kebab delete and from map-overlay deletes (maps-overlays.js:347).

rows.evidence: #delConfirmOverlay [data-fn=cancelDeleteConfirm] 'Cancel' rendered + enabled in the confirm overlay
rows.notes: Cancel boundary control present (confirm path exercised instead; cancel not fired).

rows.label: OK

This CANNOT be undone.' raised by permanentDeleteLead (crm-portal-bridge.js:584-586) when the per-card 'Remove' (.nbd-dc-perm) button is clicked in the deleted-leads drawer. On OK → window._permanentDeleteLead(id) which deleteDoc(doc(db,'leads',id)) for any id not prefixed 'd-' (dashboard-bootstrap.module.js:2601-2605) — a HARD irreversible delete — then toasts 'Permanently deleted', refreshes badge and re-renders the drawer.

rows.label: Cancel

There is no confirm/cancel boundary control to drive. Dismissal is local-only (no Firestore), reversible via 'show dismissed' toggle, hence low risk.

Rowed here only to document the absence — the trigger itself belongs to the bell/notifications gap, not this delete-confirm gap. No typed-confirmation input anywhere in scope.

Shift+Enter inserts a newline.

rows.expected_behavior: Click invokes sendMessage() (same path as Enter). Disabled while a request is in flight (sendBtn.disabled=true) and re-enabled in the finally branch. On missing/invalid key in the fallback path, posts an inline AI bubble telling the user to add their Anthropic key in CRM Dashboard → Settings → Ask Joe AI.
rows.notes: danger=send: dispatches an outbound LLM/API call (incurs token cost). Pass 1 rowed this.

rows.label: ← Back to Dashboard
rows.expected_behavior: Plain anchor navigation to /pro/dashboard.html. No JS handler.

rows.label: (no Scenarios button)

The full Scenarios / New-Chat / API-key-activate control set the critic expected lives ONLY in the SPA #joe view (dashboard.html tpl-view-joe). The standalone page markup is just welcome block + textarea + send + back link (docs/pro/ask-joe.html lines 283-303). Key activation on the standalone page is implicit (sessionStorage 'nbd_joe_key' set elsewhere); there is no in-page Activate input.

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated data-action='call' → window.openDecisionPicker(): if window.DecisionEngine.openPicker exists, opens the Decision Engine scenario picker (drops a battle-tested prompt into Ask Joe); else showToast('Decision engine loading...', 'error').

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated → clearJoeChat(): removes sessionStorage JOE_CHAT_STORE, resets _joeMessages=[], re-runs initJoeChat() to repaint the empty chat, then showToast('Chat cleared','success').

rows.expected_behavior: Password-masked text input inside #joeNoKey. Holds the Anthropic key to be saved by the adjacent Activate button. Not persisted on its own.

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated → saveJoeKey(): reads #joeKeyInput, rejects with error toast if it does not start with 'sk-ant', else writes sessionStorage 'nbd_joe_key' (and removes any legacy localStorage copy), updates #joeKeyStatus, clears the input, re-runs initJoeChat() to swap from no-key to chat UI, and showToast('✓ Joe AI activated','success').

rows.expected_behavior: Each delegated → joeQuick(data-arg): sets #joeInput.value to the canned prompt then immediately calls sendJoeMessage() (fires a Claude request with live pipeline context).

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated → sendJoeMessage() (ai.js:286): reads #joeInput, appends user bubble, builds live pipeline context, dispatches a Claude Haiku request, renders the response into #joeMessages, persists to JOE_CHAT_STORE.

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated (DOMContentLoaded querySelectorAll('[data-range]')) → window.setRange(range, btn): sets module `range`, moves the .active class to the clicked tab, then render() re-buckets allDocs by getRangeStart(range) and repaints stat cards, chart, feature table, model table, and cost breakdown. 'all' uses epoch 2020-01-01.

rows.expected_behavior: Delegated → window.loadData(): sets button to '⏳ Loading…' + disabled, queries Firestore api_usage (where uid==current user, orderBy timestamp desc), rebuilds allDocs, render(), stamps #lastRefresh, showToast('✓ Analytics refreshed · N records'). On index error → 'Firestore index needed' toast; on other error → renderEmpty + error toast. Auto-fires every 60s via bootAnalytics setInterval.

rows.label: (chart bars — hover only)
rows.expected_behavior: FINDING: chart bars have NO click drilldown. They are decorative: CSS hover brightens them (.chart-bar:hover) and each carries a title='N requests · LABEL' tooltip. renderChart() builds them via innerHTML with no addEventListener and no data-action. There is no drilldown-by-bucket interaction to test.

rows.label: (no export / download / CSV control)
rows.expected_behavior: FINDING: analytics.html has NO export controls. The only interactive controls on the page are the 4 time tabs (gap-misc-013), the Refresh button (gap-misc-014), and the topbar nav links (plain anchors, covered by the global nav inventory). The feature/model tables and cost breakdown are render-only (no row clicks, no CSV/download). Confirmed by full read of analytics.html and pro-analytics.js.
rows.notes: Closes out the 'export controls beyond the 3 rows' gap as a non-existence finding. Pass 1's 3 rows ≈ the time-tab group + refresh; nothing further exists.

rows.label: Undo (or 'Retry' depending on caller)
rows.expected_behavior: Rendered by showToast() ONLY when the caller passes an undoAction. Delegated click (ui.js:1137 data-ui-action map) → window._toastUndo(toastId) → looks up the stored callback in activeToasts and invokes it, then closes the toast. Live callers: crm-pipeline.js stage-move failure (undoText='Retry', re-runs moveCard) and lead-type-change failure (undoText='Retry', re-runs changeLeadType).
rows.notes: The generic clickable toast Undo affordance. In the current codebase its only wired callers are the two crm-pipeline retry toasts (label='Retry'). The default label is 'Undo' for any future caller.

rows.label: ✕ (toast close)
rows.expected_behavior: Always present on every toast. Delegated → window._closeToast(toastId): fades + slides the toast out and deletes its activeToasts entry. Dismisses without running any undoAction.
rows.notes: Captured because the gap asked for toast affordances; the ✕ is the universal one (the Undo at gap-misc-017 is conditional).

rows.label: ✕ (remove widget)
rows.expected_behavior: Delegated (data-w-action) → NBDWidgets.removeWidget(id): drops the id from the active-widgets list, saves, re-renders the widget home, and showToast('Widget removed','info'). FINDING: this toast is fired WITHOUT an undoAction, so there is NO clickable Undo on widget-remove (contrary to the critic's flag) — removal is immediate and only reversible via the widget picker / resetDefaults.
rows.notes: danger=delete (removes a configured widget). Documents that the expected Undo affordance is absent on this path — a real gap to flag, not just inventory.

rows.route: N/A (snooze via kanban context-menu / customer banner)

rows.expected_behavior: FINDING: LeadSnooze.snooze()/unsnooze() update Firestore and re-render, but their success toasts are plain showToast(msg,type) calls with NO undoAction — so there is NO clickable Undo on snooze either. To reverse a snooze the rep uses the customer-page 'Wake up now / Unsnooze' banner button or the kanban ⏰ Unsnooze context-menu item (separate controls, owned by other inventory areas). No transient Undo toast exists.
rows.notes: Closes the 'clickable Undo on snooze' part of the gap as a non-existence finding. Undo here is a persistent banner/menu action, not a toast.

rows.route: modal:nbd-dedup-overlay (fires from Add/Edit Lead save when duplicates found)
rows.selector: button.nbd-dedup-match-btn[data-lead-id] (one per matched lead, up to 3)
rows.label: <existing lead name> · High match / Possible · Click to open
rows.expected_behavior: Per-match row inside #nbd-dedup-matches. Click closes the overlay and resolves promptUser with {action:'open', leadId} → checkAndPrompt returns {proceed:false, openLeadId} so the caller ABORTS the new save and navigates to the existing lead instead. Hover swaps the row background. Built by LeadDedup.promptUser from findDuplicates (high=same phone/address, medium=same name+street).
rows.reveal_state: modal:nbd-dedup-overlay (only when ≥1 duplicate match on new-lead save)
rows.evidence: live dedup on same-address save → #nbd-dedup-matches rendered 1 match-row button
rows.notes: Per-match 'open existing' row rendered in a real dedup. Click would abort save + open existing (not fired).

rows.label: Cancel
rows.expected_behavior: Closes the overlay and resolves {action:'cancel'} → checkAndPrompt returns {proceed:false} so the new-lead save is ABORTED entirely (lead is NOT created, and no existing lead is opened). Clicking the dimmed backdrop (e.target===overlay) does the same.
rows.evidence: #nbd-dedup-cancel rendered + present in the live dedup overlay
rows.notes: Cancel/abort boundary present (create-anyway path exercised instead).

rows.label: Create anyway
rows.expected_behavior: Closes the overlay and resolves {action:'create', duplicateOf: matches[0].lead.id} → checkAndPrompt returns {proceed:true, duplicateOf} so the caller SAVES the new lead anyway, stamping a duplicateOf audit reference to the top match. Use for genuinely separate households at a shared address/phone.
rows.evidence: #nbd-dedup-create 'Create anyway' clicked → 2nd lead created with duplicateOf stamp (count 20→21)
rows.notes: Dedup override verified: saves duplicate + stamps duplicateOf to top match.

rows.label: Home
rows.expected_behavior: Bottom-nav delegate (dashboard-ui.js:404) calls mobileNav('dash') -> goTo('dash') switches to the dashboard view; toggles .active onto #mni-dash and off the other MOBILE_NAV_TABS tiles; closes any open .map-sidebar.
rows.notes: Bottom nav itself is display:none on desktop (>=769px) and display:flex on mobile (dashboard.html:4041/4288); reveal is viewport-gated. Default active on load.

rows.label: Pipeline
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('crm') -> goTo('crm') opens the Kanban pipeline view; marks #mni-crm active. The goTo wrapper (dashboard-ui.js:2186) mirrors #leadBadge count into #mni-crm-badge (shown when count != 0).
rows.notes: Carries #mni-crm-badge (unread/new-lead count mirror). Badge starts .dn (hidden).

rows.label: (Pipeline count badge)
rows.expected_behavior: Non-interactive status indicator inside the Pipeline tab. goTo wrapper copies #leadBadge.textContent into it and sets display:block when count is truthy and != '0', else display:none. No own click handler.
rows.notes: Inventoried as a distinct element because the critic flagged the mobile badge as missing; it is display-only, no tap target of its own.

rows.label: New
rows.expected_behavior: Orange center FAB. call delegate runs mCreateFabRoute() (dashboard-actions.js:134): if toggleMobileCreatePopover exists it opens the bottom-sheet Create popover (#mCreatePopover); otherwise falls back to openLeadModal().
rows.notes: Primary mobile quick-add entry point. Does NOT navigate; opens the Create sheet (rows below).

rows.label: Ask Joe
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('joe') -> goTo('joe') opens the Ask Joe AI assistant view. 'joe' is not in MOBILE_NAV_TABS, so mobileNav deactivates all bottom tab tiles (no persistent active highlight).
rows.notes: Not a member of MOBILE_NAV_TABS ['dash','map','crm','est'] so it never shows the .active state after tap.

rows.label: More
rows.expected_behavior: toggle delegate maps data-target=mobileMore -> toggleMobileMore() (dashboard-state.js:89): toggles .open on #mobile-more-menu (full-screen All Tools drawer), toggles .active on the More tile, and locks/unlocks body scroll (body.style.overflow='hidden' while open).
rows.notes: Opens the More sheet (rows below). mobile-nav-customizer also dispatches toggleMore via data-mnc-action (mobile-nav-customizer.js:691) for the dynamic bar variant.

rows.label: (Create sheet backdrop)
rows.expected_behavior: Tapping the dimmed backdrop maps data-target=mobileCreatePopover -> closeMobileCreatePopover() (dashboard-state.js:117): sets #mCreateBackdrop.hidden and #mCreatePopover.hidden true, restores body scroll.
rows.notes: Tap-outside-to-dismiss control for the FAB Create sheet.

rows.label: New Lead
rows.expected_behavior: _mCreate('lead') (dashboard-actions.js:1274) closes the Create popover then calls openLeadModal() to open the Add Lead form.

rows.label: Photo
rows.expected_behavior: _mCreate('photo') closes the popover then clicks the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput (type=file capture=environment), invoking the device camera/photo picker.
rows.notes: Capture handled by _mCreatePhotoPicked (row gap-mobile-013).

rows.label: Task
rows.expected_behavior: _mCreate('task') closes the popover then opens openTaskModal() (falls back to openLeadModal() if the task modal fn is absent).
rows.notes: Confirm whether openTaskModal is defined on the dashboard surface or only customer.html; falls back to lead modal otherwise.

rows.label: D2D Knock
rows.expected_behavior: _mCreate('knock') closes the popover then logs a door: prefers openKnock() (new knock at current GPS), else window.D2D.openNewKnock(), else goTo('d2d') as a navigation fallback.
rows.notes: NBD-only row (no JobNimbus/CompanyCam equivalent per source comment).

rows.label: Quick Note
rows.expected_behavior: _mCreate('note') closes the popover then opens openLeadModal() (no standalone note flow yet — note captured on lead save).
rows.notes: Known stub: routes to the lead modal rather than a dedicated note modal (TODO in source).

rows.label: (hidden camera/file input)
rows.expected_behavior: On change, _mCreatePhotoPicked(event) (dashboard-actions.js:1314) takes files[0]: if PhotoEngine.uploadOne exists it uploads with source 'mobile-create-popover' and toasts 'Photo uploaded'; else stashes the file on window._pendingPhotoUploads and toasts 'Photo queued'. Resets input value in finally.
rows.notes: Shared capture input for both the Photo create-row and the view-photos shutter FAB.

rows.label: Cancel
rows.expected_behavior: closeModal->closeMobileCreatePopover() hides backdrop + popover and restores body scroll without performing any create action.
rows.notes: Explicit dismiss control for the Create sheet (paired with backdrop gap-mobile-007).

rows.label: (More drawer overlay)
rows.expected_behavior: Tapping the overlay maps data-target=mobileMore -> closeMobileMore() (dashboard-state.js:118): removes .open from #mobile-more-menu, removes .active from #mni-more, restores body scroll.
rows.notes: Tap-outside-to-dismiss for the All Tools drawer.

rows.label: ✕ (Close All Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: closeModal->closeMobileMore() closes the All Tools drawer (removes .open / .active, restores scroll).
rows.notes: Header close button in the drawer.

rows.label: Home (Core)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('home') -> goTo('home'); data-close-more present so delegate also calls closeMobileMore() to dismiss the drawer (dashboard-ui.js:409).
rows.notes: All mm-item rows with data-close-more share the mobileNav+closeMobileMore path.

rows.label: Dashboard (Core)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('dash') opens the dashboard view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Pipeline (Core)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('crm') opens the Kanban pipeline; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Prospects (Core)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('prospects') opens the Prospects view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Estimate Builder (Core)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('est') opens the Estimate Builder view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Door-to-Door (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('d2d') opens the D2D tracker view; closes the drawer.
rows.notes: Mobile equivalent of the desktop Tools drawer's D2D entry.

rows.label: Maps & Pins (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('map') opens the Maps & Pins view; closes the drawer. 'map' is a MOBILE_NAV_TABS member so it can also show active in a customized bottom bar.

rows.label: Damage Photos (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('photos') opens the view-photos surface (which exposes the shutter FAB on mobile); closes the drawer.

rows.label: Templates (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('docs') opens the Templates view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Products (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('products') opens the Products view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Drawing Tool (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('draw') opens the Drawing Tool view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Sales Training (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('training') opens the Sales Training view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Real Deal Academy (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('academy') opens the Real Deal Academy view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Crew Calendar (Tools)
rows.expected_behavior: call->openCrewCalendarFromMore() (dashboard-actions.js:124): if toggleCrewCalendar exists, opens the Crew Calendar overlay then mobileNav('home') to anchor the base view; always calls closeMobileMore() to dismiss the drawer.
rows.notes: data-fn call (not a mobileNav route); no data-close-more attr — closeMobileMore is invoked inside the handler instead.

rows.label: Storm Center (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('storm') opens the Storm Center view; closes the drawer.
rows.notes: Mobile equivalent of the desktop Insights drawer entries.

rows.label: Close Board (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('closeboard') opens the Close Board view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Rep OS (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('repos') opens the Rep OS view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Leaderboard (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('board') opens the Leaderboard view; closes the drawer.

rows.label: Daily Program (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: call->openDailyProgramFromMore() (dashboard-actions.js:120): closeMobileMore() then window.location.href='/pro/daily-success' (full-page navigation away from the SPA to the daily-success page).
rows.notes: Hard navigation (not a hash route); leaves the dashboard SPA.

rows.label: API Analytics (Insights)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('aiusage') opens the API/AI usage analytics view; closes the drawer.
rows.notes: May be role-gated (owner/admin cost visibility) at the view level; markup itself is always rendered in the drawer.

rows.label: Ask Joe AI (System)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('joe') opens the Ask Joe AI view; closes the drawer. (Duplicate route of the bottom-nav Ask Joe tile.)

rows.label: Settings (System)
rows.expected_behavior: mobileNav('settings') opens the Settings view (which hosts the only sign-out/log-out control — there is no separate mobile-only sign-out button); closes the drawer.
rows.notes: FINDING: no mobile-only sign-out exists; logout lives inside the Settings view reached here.

rows.label: (Camera shutter FAB)
rows.expected_behavior: Floating shutter button on the view-photos surface (mobile only, CSS-gated via #view-photos.active > .m-shutter-fab at <=768px). call->openPhotoEngineOrClickProxy('mCreatePhotoInput') opens PhotoEngine capture, falling back to clicking the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput (same capture path as the Photo create-row).
rows.notes: Defined inside a <template> (cloned into view-photos at render time), so the live node only exists after the photos view mounts. Mobile-only; desktop uses the inline 'Open Camera' header button.

rows.label: ← Back to Pipeline
rows.expected_behavior: Routes back to the CRM/kanban view via goTo('crm'); switches active view from #view-prospects to #view-crm.
rows.notes: Back-to-Pipeline breadcrumb present in header.

rows.label: 🚪 D2D Tracker
rows.expected_behavior: goTo('d2d') — navigates to the Door-to-Door tracker view (map + knock log).
rows.notes: D2D Tracker header button present (goTo d2d).

rows.label: ＋ New Knock
rows.expected_behavior: Calls window.openD2DOrGo() — opens the D2D quick-knock capture if window.D2D is loaded, otherwise routes to the d2d view to log a new door knock (which can auto-create a prospect lead).
rows.notes: + New Knock header button present (openQuickKnock — verified working in d8 D2D pass).

rows.label: Total (stat tile)
rows.expected_behavior: renderStats() onClick: sets state.bucketFilter='all', saveState, render() — clears bucket filter and shows all prospects across hot/warm/cold. Tile shows total prospect count and active styling when bucketFilter==='all'.
rows.notes: Total stat tile filters board to all 6.

rows.label: Hot (stat tile)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='hot', saveState, render() — filters board/list to HOT_DISPS (interested, storm_damage, callback). Tile value = count of hot-bucket prospects.
rows.notes: Hot stat tile filters to 5 (hot bucket).

rows.label: Warm (stat tile)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='warm', saveState, render() — filters to WARM_DISPS (ins_has_claim, ins_needs_file, ins_denied, come_back, left_material).
rows.notes: Warm stat tile present (0 warm).

rows.label: Cold (stat tile)
rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='cold', saveState, render() — filters to COLD_DISPS (not_home, not_interested, tenant, vacant, cold_dead, do_not_knock, other).
rows.notes: Cold stat tile present (1 cold).

rows.label: Conv. Rate / last 90 days
rows.expected_behavior: Display-only tile (no click handler — has no data-bucket attribute so the click wiring skips it). Shows computeStats().convRate = promoted Door-to-Door leads / all D2D leads created in last 90d, as a percentage.
rows.notes: Conv. Rate tile renders (0%, last 90 days).

rows.label: Age filter (Any age / Fresh <7d / 7-14d / 14-30d / 30d+)
rows.expected_behavior: On change: state.age = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters keeps only prospects whose ageBucket(ageInDays) === selected ('fresh'<7d, 'warm'7-14d, 'cold'14-30d, 'ice'30d+).
rows.notes: Age filter (5 options) filters: Fresh<7d -> 6 to 3 cards; restored.

rows.label: Attempts filter (Any / 1st knock / 2nd knock / 3+ knocks)
rows.expected_behavior: On change: state.attempts = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters matches attemptCount() (parsed from 'D2D Knock #N' in notes); '3' means >=3, otherwise exact match.
rows.notes: Attempts filter settable (1st knock); board reflowed; restored.

rows.label: Rep filter (All reps / per-rep)
rows.expected_behavior: On change: state.rep = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters keeps only prospects with userId===rep. Options built from collectReps() (distinct userId+repName across _leads).
rows.notes: Rep filter not present for a solo owner (#pf-rep absent) — multi-rep-only control.

rows.label: Follow-up due (checkbox)
rows.expected_behavior: On change: state.followUpDue = checked, saveState, render(). When checked, applyFilters keeps only prospects whose lead.followUp date is in the past (isFollowUpDue).
rows.notes: Follow-up due checkbox filters (6 to 3); restored OFF.

rows.label: Show hidden (checkbox)
rows.expected_behavior: On change: state.showHidden = checked, saveState, render(). When unchecked (default), applyFilters excludes prospects with prospectHidden===true; when checked, soft-hidden prospects reappear.
rows.notes: Show hidden checkbox toggles; restored OFF.

rows.label: ▦ Kanban (view toggle)
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: state.view='kanban', saveState, render() → renderKanban() groups filtered prospects into disposition columns (color-coded, with attempt/age/photo cards).
rows.notes: Kanban view toggle renders cards.

rows.label: ≡ List (view toggle)
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: state.view='list', saveState, render() → renderList() shows filtered prospects sorted by age ascending as flat rows (address, disposition chip, knock #, age, follow-up-due badge).
rows.notes: List view toggle renders rows; back to Kanban works.

rows.label: Prospect card (kanban)
rows.expected_behavior: wireCardClicks: onClick opens window.openCardDetailModal(leadId) — the shared lead-detail modal, which for a prospect shows the orange Promote banner + quick-actions row. Toast 'Lead detail not loaded yet' if modal fn missing.
rows.notes: Prospect card opens card-detail modal (quick actions + promote banner).

rows.label: Prospect row (list)
rows.expected_behavior: wireCardClicks: onClick opens window.openCardDetailModal(leadId) — same shared modal as the kanban card.
rows.notes: List-view prospect rows render with data-lead-id.

rows.label: Review (stale-prospect banner)
rows.expected_behavior: data-pr-action delegate calls Prospects.reviewStale(): sets state.age='ice' (30d+), saveState, dismisses banner for session, render(), and toasts 'Filtered to 30d+ prospects — Hide or Delete the dead ones'.
rows.reveal_state: after:>=1 prospect older than 60d (auto-shows, once per session)
rows.notes: Banner only appears when staleCount()>=1 and not dismissed this session (sessionStorage nbd_prospects_stale_dismissed_v1).

rows.label: Not now (stale-prospect banner)
rows.expected_behavior: data-pr-action delegate calls Prospects.dismissStale(): writes sessionStorage flag '1' and re-renders the banner (hiding it for the rest of the session). Does NOT change filters.

rows.label: 📊 Conversion Analytics — last 90 days (collapsible)
rows.expected_behavior: Native <details>/<summary> expand-collapse. Body shows promotion rate by disposition (top 6) and by knock attempt (1st/2nd/3+). Auto-open when total D2D leads in 90d >=5. No-op render when zero D2D leads.
rows.notes: Conversion Analytics collapsible toggles open/closed (by-disposition + by-knock-attempt breakdowns).

rows.label: ✓ Promote to Customer
rows.expected_behavior: data-action=call data-fn=cdaConfirmPromote → cdaConfirmPromote() calls confirmPromoteProspect(window._cardDetailLeadId). Opens a single confirm dialog (see -022); on confirm calls promoteProspect() which flips isProspect=false + serverTimestamp, then closeCardDetailModal(). Lead moves from Prospects page into the kanban as a real customer.
rows.source_ref: dashboard.html:12627 (+ dashboard-actions.js:243 cdaConfirmPromote, :1376 confirmPromoteProspect; promoteProspect crm-portal-bridge.js:628)
rows.notes: Promote-to-Customer banner button present in card detail (found by ref).

rows.label: Promote (confirm-dialog OK)
rows.expected_behavior: Themed in-app confirm (D2D.uiConfirm → uiConfirm → native confirm fallback). Message: 'Promote <name> to a full customer? This adds them to your kanban as a real lead and removes them from the Prospects page.' Clicking Promote resolves true → promoteProspect runs.
rows.notes: Promote confirm dialog: hung CDP once mid-interaction; not safe to fire on a real prospect (would move it to the pipeline). Boundary deferred — Jo-driven or on a ZZ_QA D2D knock-created prospect.

rows.label: Cancel (promote confirm-dialog)
rows.expected_behavior: Resolves false; confirmPromoteProspect returns without calling promoteProspect — lead stays a prospect, modal stays open.
rows.notes: Promote-cancel — same dialog as 022; deferred.

rows.label: 📞 Call
rows.expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: onClick sets window.location.href='tel:'+digits-only phone. Disabled (greyed, no handler) when lead has no phone.
rows.notes: Quick-action 📞 Call present in #prospectQuickActions.

rows.label: 💬 Text
rows.expected_behavior: onClick sets window.location.href='sms:'+digits-only phone. Disabled when no phone.
rows.notes: Quick-action 💬 Text present (boundary — sms: not fired).

rows.label: ✉️ Email
rows.expected_behavior: onClick sets window.location.href='mailto:'+email. Disabled when lead has no email.
rows.notes: Quick-action ✉️ Email present (boundary — not fired).

rows.label: 🚪 Re-knock
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: closeCardDetailModal() then window.D2D.openQuickKnock({address,lat,lng}) prefilled from the lead; falls back to goTo('d2d') if D2D engine not loaded.
rows.notes: Quick-action 🚪 Re-knock present.

rows.label: 🗺️ See on Map
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: closeCardDetailModal() then window.viewProspectOnMap(lead.id) → goTo('d2d') and flies the D2D map to lead.lat/lng (D2D.flyTo or _d2dMap.setView zoom 17). Disabled when lead has no lat/lng; viewProspectOnMap also toasts 'No coordinates' as a guard.
rows.notes: Quick-action 🗺️ See on Map present.

rows.label: 🗄️ Hide / 👁️ Unhide
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: window.toggleProspectHidden(lead.id) — flips prospectHidden via updateDoc (soft-hide, record kept), toasts 'Prospect hidden'/'Prospect visible', closes modal, refreshes Prospects view. Label/icon reflect current isHidden state.
rows.notes: Quick-action 🗄️ Hide present (boundary — would hide a real prospect; not fired).

rows.label: 🗑️ Delete
rows.expected_behavior: onClick: window.absoluteDeleteProspect(lead.id). Hard guard refuses if lead.isProspect!==true (toast 'Cannot permanent-delete a customer — use Trash instead'). Otherwise launches the 3-step destructive flow (-031,-032,-033). On full confirm: deleteDoc, splice from window._leads, toast 'Permanently deleted', close modal, refresh, dispatch leadsChanged. PERMANENT — no trash recovery.
rows.notes: Delete present but is a 3-step typed-DELETE gate on a REAL prospect — not safe to fire; boundary deferred to a ZZ_QA-knock prospect.

rows.label: Continue (delete step 1)
rows.expected_behavior: First of three gates. Message: 'Permanently delete <name>? ... The record will be ERASED — no recovery from trash. Use Hide if you just want to clear them from the view.' Continue → proceed to step 2; Cancel → abort.
rows.notes: Confirm control captured as its own row per gap brief.

rows.label: I'm sure (delete step 2)
rows.expected_behavior: Second gate. Message: 'Are you ABSOLUTELY sure? Last chance to back out before the final confirmation. Click Cancel to keep them as a hidden prospect instead.' I'm sure → proceed to typed gate; Cancel → abort.

rows.label: Type DELETE (delete step 3, typed gate)
rows.expected_behavior: Final typed gate via _prospectPrompt (D2D.uiPrompt → uiPrompt → native prompt). Message: 'Type DELETE in all caps to permanently remove <name>. Anything else cancels.' Only the exact string 'DELETE' proceeds to deleteDoc; any other value toasts 'Delete cancelled' and aborts.
rows.notes: Typed-confirmation input captured as its own row per gap brief.

rows.label: 🎲 Load Sample Data
rows.expected_behavior: data-action=call data-fn=loadSampleData → loadSampleData() (must be signed in, else toast 'Please sign in first'). Writes a set of demo lead docs (Sarah Martinez, Michael Chen, Jennifer Williams, ...) to the leads collection for the current user/company so the kanban has data.
rows.reveal_state: after:kanban fails to load (#crmDiagnostic display:none until shown)
rows.notes: Writes live sample lead documents — not destructive but pollutes the real leads collection; flag for QA cleanup. Diagnostic panel itself is hidden by default and only surfaces on a load failure.

rows.label: 🔄 Retry Load
rows.expected_behavior: data-fn=retryLoadLeads → retryLoadLeads(): sets crmHealthBadge to 'loading', toasts 'Retrying CRM data load...', re-invokes loadLeads().

rows.label: 🔐 Test Rules
rows.expected_behavior: data-fn=testFirestoreRules → testFirestoreRules() (requires auth). Runs 5 live probes: read leads, WRITE a temp lead (_test:true), DELETE that temp doc, read estimates, read photos. Results written to #crmDiagnosticDetails + console; toasts pass/fail. On permission-denied shows rules-fix guidance.
rows.notes: Self-cleaning: it creates and immediately deletes one _test lead doc. If the delete step fails (rules block), a stray _test lead can remain — flag for QA verification.

rows.label: 📋 Copy Debug Info
rows.expected_behavior: data-fn=copyDebugInfo → copyDebugInfo(): builds a debug block (user email/uid, db connected, auth state, leads-in-memory count, captured console logs) and navigator.clipboard.writeText; toast '✅ Debug info copied' / '❌ Failed to copy' (logs to console on failure).
rows.notes: Copies user email + UID to clipboard — minor PII surface, no server write.

rows.label: ▶ Show Debug Console (toggle)
rows.expected_behavior: data-action=toggle flips #debugConsole visibility (display none/block) to reveal the captured console-log feed (#debugConsoleContent). The ▶ caret (#debugConsoleToggle) indicates state.
rows.notes: Generic toggle action; debug feed populated by the console-capture hook in dashboard-bootstrap.module.js.

rows.label: ✕ Dismiss
rows.expected_behavior: data-action=hideEl sets #crmDiagnostic display:none, dismissing the diagnostic panel for the session (does not fix or reload anything).

rows.route: #storm (view-storm, SPA view; container #stormCenterContainer hydrated by storm-center.js)
rows.label: 🔄 Refresh Alerts
rows.expected_behavior: Calls StormCenter.refresh(): removes the nbd_storm_alerts_cache localStorage key, re-resolves user geolocation (falls back to Cincinnati 39.1031,-84.5120), then re-fetches active NWS alerts (api.weather.gov) for the user's NWS zone/state, re-scores them and re-renders. Button shows '⏳ Loading...' while isLoading. Toast 'Could not fetch weather alerts' on failure.
rows.notes: Refresh Alerts re-fetches (1 active alert stable).

rows.label: 📡 Live Alerts
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('alerts') → sets currentTab='alerts' and re-renders. Shows the active-alerts list (renderAlertsTab): each NWS alert as a severity-colored card with event icon, areaDesc, severity/hail/wind/damage-prob chips, time-ago + expiry, and a CREATE ZONE button. Empty state '☀️ No Active Alerts' when alerts=[].
rows.notes: Live Alerts tab renders the alert list.

rows.label: 🗺️ Storm Zones
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('zones') → re-renders showing saved storm zones (renderZonesTab) from localStorage nbd_storm_zones. Each zone card is clickable (data-storm-action=openZone) with status/roofs/knocks/pipeline chips and inline Plan + Knock buttons. Empty state '🗺️ No Storm Zones Yet'.
rows.notes: Storm Zones tab — real click switches (empty state, then zone card after create).

rows.label: 🚪 Canvass Plans
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('canvass') → re-renders renderCanvassTab showing only zones that have a generated canvassPlan: priority badge, optimal-window card, revenue projection tiles, numbered action steps, talking points, suggested team size, and a full-width 'START KNOCKING THIS ZONE' button. Empty state '📋 No Canvass Plans Yet' until a plan is generated from a zone.
rows.notes: Canvass Plans tab rendered the generated plan.

rows.label: 📊 Storm Analytics
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('analytics') → re-renders renderAnalyticsTab: computed stat tiles (Total Zones, Storm Knocks, Leads Generated, Conversion Rate), a Zone History list, and a Carrier Response Times grid (static CARRIER_RESPONSE constants). All read-only; no controls inside the tab.
rows.notes: Storm Analytics tab renders (zone history + carrier response table). NEW-C3 counter semantics still deferred.

rows.label: CREATE ZONE
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.createZone(alertId) → createZoneFromAlert finds the alert, builds a storm zone (sz_<ts>) with estimated roofs (polygon area × 200/sq-mi), unshifts into stormZones, persists to localStorage nbd_storm_zones, toasts 'Storm zone created: <name>', and re-renders. Also present in the alert-polygon map popup.
rows.reveal_state: after:refresh (requires at least one active alert)
rows.notes: CREATE ZONE from alert created a zone (0->1); deleted after via API — zero residue.

rows.label: Storm zone card (View)
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.openZone(zoneId) → openZoneDetail sets activeZone, forces currentTab='zones', re-renders, and (if map ready) centers the Leaflet map on zone.center at zoom 11. Also exposed as a 'View' button in the zone map popup.
rows.notes: Zone card renders stats/actions; detail exercised via the Plan flow.

rows.label: 📋 Plan
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.generatePlan(zoneId) → generatePlanForZone builds a canvass plan (priority by score, optimal 24-72h window, talking points keyed off hail/wind, carrier insights, revenue estimate, steps), saves it onto the zone in localStorage, switches currentTab='canvass' and re-renders. stopPropagation prevents the parent card's openZone.
rows.notes: Plan generated a full canvass plan with window/roofs/jobs/revenue.

rows.label: 🚪 Knock / 🚪 START KNOCKING THIS ZONE
rows.expected_behavior: StormCenter.pushToD2D(zoneId) → pushZoneToD2DById sets zone.status='canvassing', saves localStorage, then pushZoneToD2D writes a 'territories' doc to Firestore (addDoc with userId + companyId resolved from _userClaims.companyId||uid) when _db/_user present, toasts 'Territory pushed to D2D Tracker', and createLeadsFromZone calls window.goTo('d2d') + toast.
rows.notes: pushToD2D not fired (cross-surface seeding boundary).

rows.label: ← Back to Dashboard
rows.expected_behavior: Generic dashboard data-action='goTo' delegate navigates the SPA to the dash view. Defined in the static template header (tpl-view-storm), not in storm-center.js.
rows.notes: Breadcrumb selector (#view-storm span.bc-meta-cp[data-action=goTo]) matched nothing — selector stale or control absent on this view; re-inventory.

rows.label: + NEW DEAL
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.createNew() → sets currentTab='create' and re-renders, showing the New Deal Room form. Top-right header button.
rows.notes: + NEW DEAL opens the form.

rows.label: 📋 Active Deals
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('active') → currentTab='active', re-renders renderActiveDeals: every deal room as a card with customer name/address, status chip (draft/sent/viewed/accepted/signed/scheduled/expired), better-tier price, view count, sent-via, created/expires, and a 4-button action column (Preview/Text/Email/Copy). Empty state '📋 No Deal Rooms Yet'.
rows.notes: Active Deals tab — real click, deal card listed after create.

rows.label: ➕ New Deal
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('create') → currentTab='create', re-renders the New Deal Room form (renderCreateForm).

rows.label: 📊 Analytics
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('analytics') → currentTab='analytics', re-renders renderAnalytics: Total/Sent/Viewed/Close-Rate stat tiles + a 3-step Conversion Funnel (Created→Sent, Sent→Viewed, Viewed→Signed) with proportional bars. Read-only.
rows.notes: Close Board Analytics tab renders (TOTAL/SENT/VIEWED/CLOSE RATE + conversion funnel; all 0 after cleanup, correct).

rows.label: Customer Name / Phone / Email / Address
rows.expected_behavior: Plain text/tel/email inputs read by submitCreateForm on CREATE DEAL ROOM. Customer Name is required (toast 'Customer name is required' if blank). Values flow into createDealRoom opts.
rows.notes: Name/Phone/Email/Address all accept input.

rows.label: Good ($) / Better ($) / Best ($)
rows.expected_behavior: Number inputs for the three pricing tiers. submitCreateForm requires at least one non-zero tier (toast 'Enter at least one tier price'). Values become deal.tiers.{good,better,best}.price used in the shareable deal page and financing math.
rows.notes: Good/Better/Best fields accept values; rendered in preview with financing.

rows.label: Insurance claim
rows.expected_behavior: Checkbox; an init-bound change listener (close-board.js:903) toggles #cb-ins-fields display block/none, revealing the carrier + deductible inputs. Value read as isInsurance in submitCreateForm → deal.insuranceClaim.
rows.notes: Insurance-claim checkbox toggles the conditional fields.

rows.label: Insurance carrier / Deductible $
rows.expected_behavior: Hidden until #cb-insurance is checked. Read by submitCreateForm into deal.insuranceCarrier / deal.deductible; surface in the shareable deal page's insurance box.
rows.notes: Carrier/Deductible conditional fields settable.

rows.label: CREATE DEAL ROOM
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.submitCreate() → submitCreateForm validates (name required, ≥1 tier price), builds a deal via createDealRoom (status=draft, 14-day expiry, generateId dr_<ts>), persists to localStorage nbd_deal_rooms AND syncDealToFirestore (setDoc deal_rooms/<id> merged, tagged userId+companyId), toasts 'Deal room created for <name>', switches to Active tab.
rows.notes: CREATE DEAL ROOM works (ZZ_QA deal created then deleted; LS clean). See NEW-D14 note on the dead Firestore sync.

rows.label: 👁 Preview
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.preview(dealId) → openDealPreview generates the full shareable deal-page HTML and opens it through NBDDocViewer.open({html, title, filename}) as same-origin srcdoc (Print/PDF/Email/Save controls live inside the viewer). Falls back to window.open + document.write if NBDDocViewer absent.
rows.notes: Preview renders the branded deal room in the viewer.

rows.label: 📱 Text
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendSMS(dealId) → sendViaSMS: requires customerPhone (toast 'No phone number' if missing), uploads the deal page to Firebase Storage (uploadDealPage → deal_rooms/<uid>/<id>.html, getDownloadURL), opens sms:<phone>?body=<prefilled link msg> via window.open(_self), and updateDeal sets status=sent, sentVia='sms', sentAt now (Firestore sync).
rows.notes: NEW-D13 FIXED (PR #610, live-verified via Copy).

rows.label: 📧 Email
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendEmail(dealId) → sendViaEmail: requires customerEmail (toast 'No email' if missing), uploads deal page to Storage, opens mailto:<email>?subject=&body=<prefilled link + rep signature> via window.open(_self), and updateDeal sets status=sent, sentVia='email', sentAt now (Firestore sync).
rows.notes: NEW-D13 FIXED (PR #610, live-verified via Copy).

rows.label: 🔗 Copy
rows.expected_behavior: CloseBoard.copyLink(dealId) → copyDealLink: if deal.shareUrl exists, navigator.clipboard.writeText(it) + toast 'Link copied!'; otherwise generates+uploads the deal page to Storage first, then copies the returned download URL (toast 'Could not generate link' on upload failure).
rows.notes: NEW-D13 FIXED + LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-10 ('Link copied!' + storage URL).

rows.label: ← Back to Pipeline
rows.expected_behavior: Generic goTo delegate navigates the SPA to the crm (pipeline) view. Static template header.

rows.label: ⚡ GENERATE TODAY'S BRIEFING
rows.expected_behavior: RepOS.generate() → generateBriefing: shows 'Generating...' state, collects D2D metrics (window.D2D.getKnocks), gamification, storm data (StormCenter), deal data (CloseBoard), weather (OpenWeather, needs nbd_weather_key), and coaching tips; builds today's briefing object, replaces today's entry in nbd_rep_briefings localStorage (30-day retention), re-renders the full briefing.
rows.reveal_state: always (welcome screen when no briefing yet)
rows.notes: GENERATE TODAY'S BRIEFING renders the full briefing (greeting, storm card, coaching, day plan, quick actions). Local compute + weather only — no AI cost.

rows.label: 🔄 Refresh
rows.expected_behavior: RepOS.regenerate() → clears todayBriefing then re-runs generateBriefing, rebuilding the day's briefing from fresh D2D/storm/deal/weather data. Header button.
rows.notes: Refresh regenerates the briefing.

rows.label: VIEW (streak)
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate calls window.goTo('d2d') then, because data-repos-d2d-tab='gamify' is present, window.D2D.setTab('gamify') to land on the gamification tab of the D2D tracker.
rows.notes: Gamification streak card did not render in this briefing (conditional on streak data).

rows.label: OPEN STORM CENTER →
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('storm'). Card only renders when b.storms.activeAlerts>0 or activeZones>0.
rows.notes: OPEN STORM CENTER button renders in the storm-opportunity card (same data-repos-goto handler verified by real click on the quick action).
