rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('closeboard'). Card renders when b.deals.active>0 or pending>0; the CHECK DEALS button itself only when deals.pending>0.
rows.notes: Deal Pipeline card did not render (no close-board deals).

rows.label: 📞 Call
rows.expected_behavior: Native tel: anchor that dials the follow-up contact's phone (digits stripped of non-numerics). Rendered per follow-up row only when f.phone exists.
rows.notes: No tel: links rendered in this briefing (follow-ups list conditional).

rows.label: 🚪 Start Knocking
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('d2d'). Always present in the Quick Actions 2x2 grid once a briefing is rendered.
rows.notes: Start Knocking quick action present (data-repos-goto=d2d; handler family verified).

rows.label: ⛈️ Storm Center
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('storm'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
rows.notes: Storm Center quick action — REAL click navigated to #/storm.

rows.label: 📋 Close Board
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('closeboard'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
rows.notes: Close Board quick action present (same handler family).

rows.label: 🎓 Sales Practice
rows.expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('training'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
rows.notes: Sales Practice quick action present (same handler family).

rows.expected_behavior: Generic goTo delegate → dash view. Static template header (tpl-view-repos).

rows.route: #reports (view-reports, SPA view; static template + JS-hydrated panels)
rows.label: ✨ Enrich Data
rows.expected_behavior: data-action='call' data-fn='enrichReportData' → NBDReports.enrichData(): window.confirm dialog, then calls the 'backfillAnalytics' Cloud Function (httpsCallable) to derive time-of-day buckets, reverse-geocode knock GPS into city/zip, and parse lead addresses. Disables button to '⏳ Enriching...', alerts a summary, toasts result. Rate-limited 1/10min server-side (resource-exhausted handled).
rows.notes: Enrich Data button fires (native confirm captured).

rows.label: OK (Run enrichment confirm)
rows.expected_behavior: Native window.confirm: returning true proceeds with the backfillAnalytics call; false aborts before any server call. The confirm body lists the three enrichment actions and the 1-run/10-min limit.
rows.notes: Enrichment confirm driven to the boundary and CANCELLED (no enrichment run).

rows.label: ＋ New Report
rows.expected_behavior: data-action='call' data-fn='openReportGenerator' → NBDReports.openGenerator(): runs init() which renderGeneratorUI into #reportGeneratorContainer (template picker + date range + presets + comparison/AI toggles + Generate button) and listSavedReports, then scrolls #reportGenPanel into view.
rows.notes: + New Report opens the generator panel.

rows.label: 🎯 Rep Monthly Review
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('rep-monthly') → sets _selectedTemplate and highlights the card (orange border). Drives which template generate() builds. Template = per-rep coaching deep dive (knocks, deals, revenue, velocity, top cities).
rows.notes: Rep Monthly Review card renders + selectable.

rows.label: 🗺️ Territory Deep Dive
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('territory') → selects the Territory template (best cities/zips, revenue-per-territory heatmap + ranked table) and highlights the card.
rows.notes: Territory Deep Dive card renders + selectable.

rows.label: 📊 Pipeline Health Check
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('pipeline-health') → selects the Pipeline Health template (stage funnel, velocity, bottleneck detection, stuck deals) and highlights the card.
rows.notes: Pipeline Health Check — selected + generated end-to-end (real-data report).

rows.label: 💰 Revenue Recap
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('revenue-recap') → selects the Revenue Recap template (owner/partner meeting view: revenue breakdown, avg deal, closed vs pipeline, trend bar chart) and highlights the card.
rows.notes: Revenue Recap card renders + selectable.

rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('customer-journey') → selects the Customer Journey template. This template has requiresLead=true, so clicking Generate triggers the Pick-a-Customer lead-picker modal before building.
rows.notes: Customer Journey — selected; generate opens the lead-picker modal.

rows.label: Period Start / Period End
rows.expected_behavior: Date inputs (default last-30-days) read by generateSelected. Start>End is rejected with toast 'Start date must be before end date'. Define the report's reporting window (and the comparison baseline length).
rows.notes: Period Start/End populated by quick ranges.

rows.label: Today / Last 7 days / Last 30 days / Last 90 days / Last 12 months / All time
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.setQuickRange(key) → sets #reportRangeStart/#reportRangeEnd to the corresponding preset window (today, -7d, -30d, -90d, -365d, or 2020-01-01 for 'all'); end always = now.
rows.notes: Quick-range presets work (Last 30 days verified exact dates).

rows.label: Compare Against (none / vs Prior period / vs Same period last year)
rows.expected_behavior: Select read by generateSelected → opts.compareMode. 'prior' computes the immediately-preceding same-length window; 'yoy' shifts the window back one year; metrics computed for both and rendered as delta chips. 'none' skips comparison.
rows.notes: Compare Against select settable ('prior').

rows.label: Include Claude-written insights
rows.expected_behavior: Checkbox (checked by default) → opts.includeNarrative. When true and window.callClaude exists, generate() awaits a Claude narrative paragraph; on failure or absence it falls back to a deterministic templated summary (never blocks the report).
rows.notes: Include-narrative checkbox toggles.

rows.label: 📈 Generate Report
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.generateSelected() → reads range/compare/narrative, calls generate(_selectedTemplate, opts). For customer-journey, first opens the lead picker. Computes metrics + optional comparison + narrative, builds report HTML, SAVES it to Firestore (saveReport via window._saveReport, html stored for instant re-open), then opens it in NBDDocViewer (Print/PDF/Email/Save controls), and refreshes the My Reports list.
rows.notes: Generate Report renders the report in the viewer (see NEW-D10 blank funnel-chart note).

rows.label: Search customers...
rows.expected_behavior: Filters the customer list live (on input) by firstName/lastName/address/phone substring against window._leads; shows up to 100 rows. Empty result shows 'No customers match "q"'.

rows.label: <Customer name + address> row
rows.expected_behavior: Clicking a customer row removes the overlay and calls onPick(lead.id) → re-invokes generate('customer-journey', {leadId, lead}) to build the journey report for that customer.
rows.notes: Per-customer rows render (22). Row click not fired — a journey report would auto-save and saved reports are currently undeletable (NEW-D11); exercise after PR #609.

rows.label: Cancel
rows.expected_behavior: Dismisses the lead-picker overlay without generating a report (overlay.remove). Build is aborted.
rows.notes: Cancel closes the picker.

rows.label: Open (saved report)
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.openSavedReport(id) → finds the report in window._reports and re-opens its stored html in NBDDocViewer.open (instant, no recompute) with Print/PDF/Email/Save. Toast 'Report not found' / 'Doc viewer not loaded' on failure.
rows.notes: Open (saved report) works.

rows.label: 🗑 (delete saved report)
rows.expected_behavior: NBDReports.deleteSavedReport(id) → window.confirm('Delete this report? This cannot be undone.'); on OK calls window._deleteReport(id) (Firestore delete), toasts '✓ Report deleted', and re-renders My Reports.
rows.notes: NEW-D11 FIXED + LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-10 (see d9-insights-028).

rows.label: OK (Delete report confirm)
rows.expected_behavior: Native window.confirm for deleteSavedReport: OK proceeds with the irreversible _deleteReport; Cancel aborts with no change.

rows.label: 7 days / 30 days / 90 days / YTD

rows.notes: Performance-dashboard period buttons take effect (YTD switches header to 'vs. previous year'; restored to 30 days).

rows.label: Back
rows.expected_behavior: Calls history.back() to return to the previous page.
rows.reveal_state: after:estimate-loaded (button row injected into #evRoot once the estimate doc renders)
rows.notes: Customer-facing. Only the print + back buttons are interactive on this page; line items and totals are static text.

rows.route: N/A (standalone public, ?token= query param, no Firebase auth)
rows.label: ✍️ Submit Signature
rows.expected_behavior: postMessages {__nbd_sig:'finalize'} to the sandboxed doc iframe to bake canvas signatures into PNGs, then POSTs submitSignature({token,signedHtml}) to the Cloud Function; on success burns the token and shows the 'All done' confirmation. Alerts if signature missing / iframe still loading.
rows.reveal_state: after:document-loaded (footer #spFoot is display:none until getSignDocument succeeds and the iframe fires load)
rows.notes: Customer/remote-signer facing. Token-gated public page (no auth). DANGER: this is the e-signature commit — drive only to the confirm/finalize boundary, do not submit a real signature against a live token. The doc-to-sign lives inside the sandboxed #spFrame iframe (srcdoc'd HTML loading signature-widget.js).

rows.label: ← Back
rows.expected_behavior: href is rewritten on auth to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId>; returns the rep to the originating customer page.
rows.reveal_state: always (href set after onAuthStateChanged resolves the leadId)
rows.notes: Operator (rep) facing photo review sprint. Auth-gated: redirects to /pro/login.html if not signed in.

rows.expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId>#photo-report, which auto-opens the Homeowner-vs-Adjuster photo-report picker. Disabled while there are zero photos.
rows.reveal_state: always (disabled attr toggled: enabled only when state.photos.length > 0)
rows.notes: Operator facing. Hand-off to customer page report generator.

rows.expected_behavior: Sets state.filter to the clicked data-filter value, marks the button active, and re-renders the photo grid filtered to that phase (or 'unsorted' = photos with no phase). Counts in each pill update live from the photo subscription.

rows.label: Photo thumbnail (tap to select)
rows.expected_behavior: Tap toggles the photo into/out of state.selected (shows check overlay + opens bulk bar). Long-press (450ms) opens the full-size lightbox instead. Desktop drag on empty area = lasso multi-select.
rows.reveal_state: after:photos-loaded (repeats per photo tile in #prBody grid)
rows.notes: Representative of the per-photo tile image. De-duped: one entry for all tiles. Selection drives the bulk-action bar.

rows.label: Phase / Location / Damage / Severity chip (+ Phase etc when empty)
rows.expected_behavior: Tap: if AI 'suggested', accepts the AI value and writes it to the photo doc (updateDoc) + toast; if 'empty', opens the value picker overlay; if already set, toasts 'long-press to change'. Long-press always opens the picker overlay for that field.
rows.reveal_state: after:photos-loaded (4 chips repeat per photo tile)
rows.notes: Representative of the 4 metadata chips per tile. Writes to Firestore photos/<id>. Picker option dictionaries at FIELD_OPTIONS (phase/damageType/severity).

rows.label: Picker option (e.g. Before/During/After, Hail/Wind/…, Minor/…)
rows.expected_behavior: Writes the chosen value to the target photo's field (single) or batch-updates all selected photos (bulk mode), via updateDoc/writeBatch + serverTimestamp; closes the picker and toasts confirmation.
rows.reveal_state: modal:prPicker (overlay opened by a chip tap/long-press or a bulk-field button)
rows.notes: Options injected dynamically per field. Clicking the dimmed backdrop closes without saving.

rows.label: Clear value
rows.expected_behavior: Calls applyPickerChoice(null) — clears the field on the target/selected photo(s) by writing null + serverTimestamp, then closes the picker.
rows.notes: Inside the field-value picker overlay.

rows.label: Phase / Damage / Severity (bulk)
rows.expected_behavior: Opens the value picker in bulk mode (photoId=null); the chosen value is batch-applied to every photo in state.selected. No-op if nothing selected.
rows.reveal_state: after:selection (bulk bar #prBulkBar opens when >=1 photo selected)
rows.notes: 3 bulk-field buttons in the bulk action bar.

rows.label: 📤 Share
rows.expected_behavior: Batch-sets sharedWithHomeowner=true on all selected photos (writeBatch) so they appear in the homeowner portal view, toasts the count, clears selection, then best-effort calls PortalLinkHelpers.copyForLead(lead) to copy the portal link.
rows.notes: DANGER(send): publishes photos to the homeowner-visible portal + triggers a share-link copy. Drive to confirm boundary only against test data.

rows.label: Delete
rows.expected_behavior: After a confirm() prompt ('Delete N photos? This can't be undone.'), batch-deletes every selected photo doc from Firestore (writeBatch delete), clears selection, toasts the count.
rows.notes: DANGER(delete): permanent. Has native confirm() gate — stop at the confirm dialog.

rows.label: Done
rows.expected_behavior: Calls clearSelection() — empties state.selected, removes the selected styling from all tiles, and closes the bulk action bar.

rows.label: × (close lightbox)
rows.expected_behavior: Calls closeLightbox() — hides the full-size image overlay and clears the img src. Esc key or backdrop click also close it.
rows.reveal_state: modal:prLightbox (opened by long-press on a tile image)

rows.notes: Theme picker overlaps the SPA theme engine (maps.js) — same nbdPickerOpen surface.

rows.expected_behavior: Calls exportCSV() — exports the page/tracker data as a downloadable CSV file.

rows.expected_behavior: Calls addFloorRow() — appends a new editable floor row (label/target/unit inputs + remove ×) to #floor-editor and re-renders. Max 7 floors.

rows.expected_behavior: Per-row: label input → ob-floor-label, target number → ob-floor-target, unit input → ob-floor-unit (each updates obFloors[idx] live); × button → removeFloorRow(idx) deletes the row and re-renders.

rows.expected_behavior: Onboarding step 4 text field for the reward earned when all floors are cleared.

Lead then appeared in the CRM pipeline IMMEDIATELY as 'ZZ_QA_ Inspect Bridge Test', stage New, source 'Website — Inspection / Storm tool' (publicLeadCollection=inspect_leads).

NEW-5 BEHAVIORALLY VERIFIED: CRM soft-delete of the bridged lead now STICKS across full reload (no inspect_leads re-sync; count 23->22 stable). Prior leftover ZZ_QA_ Inspect Bridge Test was already gone from pipeline pre-session. Zero ZZ_QA residue.
